name: Cold Lunch Biscuits
recipeIngredient: Enough flour to make stiff dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients and knead well until a stiff dough forms.
2. Shape the dough into small biscuits.
3. Bake at 350°F for about 20 minutes, or until lightly browned.
Keeps for several weeks in a tightly sealed container.
